name: GmailConnector
description: Connects to Google Gmail to list, search, send, and delete emails using OAuth2.

install_fields.label: Google OAuth2 Client ID
install_fields.help: The OAuth2 Client ID from your Google Cloud Console project credentials.

install_fields.label: Google OAuth2 Client Secret
install_fields.help: The OAuth2 Client Secret from your Google Cloud Console project credentials.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Scopes
install_fields.help: Space-separated OAuth2 scopes. Defaults to gmail.modify and gmail.send if not set.

install_fields.label: Authorization URL
install_fields.help: Google OAuth2 authorization endpoint. Defaults to https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth.

install_fields.label: Token URL
install_fields.help: Google OAuth2 token endpoint. Defaults to https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token.

install_fields.label: Gmail API Base URL
install_fields.help: Gmail REST API base URL. Defaults to https://gmail.googleapis.com/gmail/v1.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum number of API requests per minute. Leave blank to use provider defaults.

methods.name: install
methods.description: Persist connector configuration and return a PENDING status prompting the user to authorize via OAuth.

methods.name: authorize
methods.description: Exchange an OAuth2 authorization code for access and refresh tokens; persist via set_token().

methods.name: health_check
methods.description: Verify that the stored token is valid and the Gmail API is reachable.

methods.name: sync
methods.description: Incrementally sync Gmail messages using an 'after:{epoch}' search query; paginates until all messages are fetched.

methods.name: list_emails
methods.description: Return a single paginated page of normalized email documents, optionally filtered by query.

methods.name: list_email
methods.description: Fetch and normalize a single email message by its Gmail message ID.

methods.name: search_email
methods.description: Search Gmail messages using Gmail search syntax and return a page of normalized documents.

methods.name: send_email
methods.description: Send an email from the authenticated Gmail account with optional CC, BCC, reply-to, and attachments.

methods.name: delete_email
methods.description: Move an email to Trash (permanent=False) or permanently delete it (permanent=True).
